channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Law Enforcement Leaning Away from Considering Nancy Guthrie's Relatives as Suspects: Reports
item.description: Three weeks into the investigation, authorities are leaning away from suspecting Nancy Guthrie's family members of her abduction

item.title: Cynthia Erivo Addresses the 'Strange' Speculation That She and Her “Wicked” Costar Ariana Grande 'Were Lovers'
item.description: Erivo discussed her close relationship with Grande, with whom she began working on the set of 'Wicked' back in 2022, in a recent interview

item.title: Did Meghan Markle Debut a Fresh Haircut at the NBA All-Star Game?
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex appeared to tuck back some short strands around her face

item.title: Giada De Laurentiis Shares Loving Valentine's Day Post to Boyfriend Shane Farley
item.description: De Laurentiis and Farley celebrated their 10th anniversary in September

item.title: Bobby Flay Shares Valentine’s Day Tribute to Brooke Williamson: ‘The Best Dip in the World’
item.description: Flay posted a photo from the New York City Wine & Food Festival in October, when the couple led the crowd in a dance party

item.title: Former NFL Star Tre Johnson Dies On Family Vacation At 54 Years Old
item.description: Former NFL star Tre Johnson -- an All-Pro offensive lineman -- suddenly passed away on Sunday while on vacation with his family, his wife confirmed .....

item.title: Celtics' Jaylen Brown Blasts Beverly Hills After Cops Shut Down All-Star's Event
item.description: Jaylen Brown says Beverly Hills screwed up -- and he’s not staying quiet about it. Beverly Hills police shut down his All-Star Weekend panel event on ...

item.title: Scott Peterson's Attacker Won't Be Prosecuted for Pickleball Assault in Prison
item.description: The inmate who beat the hell out of wife-killer Scott Peterson during a prison pickleball match has sidestepped criminal charges, TMZ has learned. In ...

item.title: GoFundMe to Buy Bitcoin for Nancy Guthrie Investigation Launched by Arizona Man
item.description: The search for Nancy Guthrie is hitting new extremes ... members of the public are now crowdsourcing crypto, with one "concerned citizen" launching a ...

item.title: Brooks Nader Suffers Food Poisoning Mid-Flight, Ambulance Waiting on Arrival
item.description: Brooks Nader was down bad -- literally -- struck with savage food poisoning mid-flight, with an ambulance waiting for her the second the plane hit the...
